overview.description: A single coherent paragraph summarizing the purpose, nature, and major areas of the project as inferred from commit messages.

features.description: A deduplicated list of user- or API-facing high-level product capabilities, each with a normalized label and concise description.

label.description: A concise, normalized Title Case label for the feature.

description.description: A 2-3 sentence description of this feature omitting project-specific implementation details and terminology, making it suitable for a broader range of similar projects. These should be applicable to similar projects in the same domain.

non_feature_labels.description: A deduplicated list of normalized maintenance/process area labels (not user- or API-facing functional features), each with a Title Case label and specific description.

label.description: A concise, normalized Title Case label for the process or maintenance area, not a user-facing feature, and avoiding implementation-specific terminology. These should be applicable to similar projects in the same domain.

description.description: A 2-3 sentence description of this area.
